name: Chromeloader Cross-Process Injection to Load Extension
description: Detects Chromeloader activity, which involves process injection via PowerShell to load a malicious extension into Chrome.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the child process that was spawned (expected to be 'chrome.exe').

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the chrome.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute chrome.exe, including '--load-extension=' and a path within Appdata\local\chrome.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which chrome.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent PowerShell process.

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent PowerShell executable.

parameters.name: parent_command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the parent PowerShell process, containing the base64-encoded string.
